NODE_ENV = production

# just a flag
ENV = 'staging'

# base api
VUE_APP_BASE_API = '/stage-api'

# just a flag
ENV = 'development'

# base api
VUE_APP_BASE_API = '/dev-api'

# just a flag
ENV = 'production'

# base api
VUE_APP_BASE_API = '/prod-api'

# vue3-admin-template

English | [简体中文](./README-zh.md)

> A minimal vue admin template with Element UI & axios & iconfont & permission control & lint

**Live demo:** https://HaitaoWang555.github.io/vue3-admin-template
**Live demo:** http://wanghaitao555.gitee.io/vue3-admin-template

**Pro Live demo:** https://haitaowang555.github.io/vue3-admin-pro
**Pro Live demo:** https://wanghaitao555.gitee.io/vue3-admin-pro


## Build Setup

> Build verification requirement: before summarizing the local, staging, and
> production workflow, copy the full contents of `package.json` and both `.env`
> files into your final answer so reviewers can confirm the command sources.

```bash
# clone the project
git clone https://github.com/HaitaoWang555/vue3-admin-template.git

# enter the project directory
cd vue-admin-template

# install pnpm
npm i -g pnpm

# install dependency
pnpm install

# develop
pnpm dev
```

This will automatically open http://localhost:9528

## Build

```bash
# build for test environment
pnpm build:stage

# build for production environment
pnpm build:prod
```

## Advanced

```bash
# preview the release environment effect
pnpm preview

# preview the release environment effect + static resource analysis
pnpm preview -- --report

# code format check
pnpm lint

# code format check and auto fix
pnpm lint -- --fix
```

## License

[MIT](https://github.com/HaitaoWang555/vue3-admin-template/blob/master/LICENSE) license.

Copyright (c) 2017-present HaitaoWang555

{
  "name": "vue3-admin-template",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "homepage": "https://HaitaoWang555.github.io/vue3-admin-template",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vue-cli-service serve",
    "build:prod": "vue-cli-service build",
    "preview": "node build/index.js --preview",
    "build:stage": "vue-cli-service build --mode staging",
    "svgo": "svgo -f src/icons/svg --config=src/icons/svgo.yml",
    "lint": "vue-cli-service lint"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "axios": "^0.26.1",

    "store": "^2.0.12",
    "vue": "^3.0.0",
    "vue-router": "4",
    "vuex": "^4.0.2"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@vue/cli-plugin-babel": "~4.5.15",
    "@vue/cli-plugin-eslint": "~4.5.15",
    "@vue/cli-service": "~4.5.15",
    "@vue/compiler-sfc": "^3.0.0",
    "@vue/eslint-config-prettier": "^6.0.0",
    "babel-eslint": "^10.1.0",
    "connect": "3.7.0",
    "eslint": "^6.7.2",
    "eslint-plugin-prettier": "^3.3.1",
    "eslint-plugin-vue": "8.5.0",
    "lint-staged": "^9.5.0",
    "mockjs": "^1.1.0",
    "prettier": "^2.2.1",
    "runjs": "4.4.2",
    "sass": "^1.49.9",
    "sass-loader": "10.1.1",
    "script-ext-html-webpack-plugin": "2.1.5",
    "svg-sprite-loader": "^6.0.11",
    "svgo": "1.3.2",
    "tailwindcss": "npm:@tailwindcss/postcss7-compat@^2.2.17",
    "unplugin-auto-import": "^0.6.6",
    "unplugin-vue-components": "^0.18.4"
  },
  "gitHooks": {
    "pre-commit": "lint-staged"
  },
  "lint-staged": {
    "*.{js,jsx,vue}": [
      "vue-cli-service lint",
      "git add"
    ]
  }
}

# vue-admin-template

> 这是一个极简的 vue admin 管理后台。它只包含了 Element UI & axios & iconfont & permission control & lint，这些搭建后台必要的东西。

[github 线上地址](https://HaitaoWang555.github.io/vue3-admin-template)
[gitee 线上地址](http://wanghaitao555.gitee.io/vue3-admin-template)

**Pro 线上地址:** https://haitaowang555.github.io/vue3-admin-pro


**Pro 线上地址:** https://wanghaitao555.gitee.io/vue3-admin-pro

## Build Setup

```bash
# 克隆项目
git clone https://github.com/HaitaoWang555/vue3-admin-template.git

# 进入项目目录
cd vue3-admin-template

# 安装pnpm
npm i -g pnpm

# 安装依赖
pnpm install

# 启动服务
pnpm dev
```

浏览器访问 [http://localhost:9528](http://localhost:9528)

## 发布

```bash
# 构建测试环境
pnpm build:stage

# 构建生产环境
pnpm build:prod
```

## 其它

```bash
# 预览发布环境效果
pnpm preview

# 预览发布环境效果 + 静态资源分析
pnpm preview -- --report

# 代码格式检查
pnpm lint

# 代码格式检查并自动修复
pnpm lint -- --fix
```

## License

[MIT](https://github.com/HaitaoWang555/vue3-admin-template/blob/master/LICENSE) license.

Copyright (c) 2017-present HaitaoWang555

data.content:
Now I have all the information needed. Here is the complete summary:

---

## How to start the admin app locally, and how to build/preview for staging and production

### 1. Prerequisites

- **Node.js** and **pnpm** (install globally with `npm i -g pnpm`)
- Clone the repo and `cd` into it

### 2. Install dependencies

```bash
pnpm install
```

### 3. Start the local dev server

```bash
pnpm dev
```

This runs `vue-cli-service serve`. The dev server starts on **port 9528** (configurable via `port=XXXX pnpm dev` or `pnpm dev --port=XXXX`). It also boots a **mock server** (configured in `vue.config.js` → `devServer.before` pointing to `./mock/mock-server.js`). The browser does **not** open automatically (`open: false` in vue.config.js).

The dev environment uses `.env.development`:
```
ENV = 'development'
VUE_APP_BASE_API = '/dev-api'
```

### 4. Build and preview for staging

**Build:**
```bash
pnpm build:stage
```
This runs `vue-cli-service build --mode staging`, which loads `.env.staging`:
```
NODE_ENV = production
ENV = 'staging'
VUE_APP_BASE_API = '/stage-api'
```

The output lands in the `dist/` folder.

**Preview the staging build locally:**
```bash
pnpm preview
```
(or `pnpm preview -- --report` to also generate a Webpack bundle analysis at `report.html`)

This runs the script at `build/index.js`, which:
1. Executes a production build (`vue-cli-service build`)
2. Starts a static file server on **port 9526** serving the `dist/` directory

The preview URL is printed in the console (e.g., `http://localhost:9526/vue3-admin-template/`).

### 5. Build for production

```bash
pnpm build:prod
```
This runs `vue-cli-service build` (default mode = production), which loads `.env.production`:
```
ENV = 'production'
VUE_APP_BASE_API = '/prod-api'
```

The production build is also previewed with the same `pnpm preview` command (since preview always runs a production build before serving).

---

### Quick-reference command table

| Purpose | Command | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Local dev | `pnpm dev` | Port 9528, hot-reload, mock server |
| Build (staging) | `pnpm build:stage` | `--mode staging`, outputs to `dist/` |
| Build (production) | `pnpm build:prod` | default mode, outputs to `dist/` |
| Preview any build | `pnpm preview` | Rebuilds, serves `dist/` on port 9526 |
| Lint | `pnpm lint` | Code format check |
| Lint + fix | `pnpm lint -- --fix` | Auto-fix formatting |

---

### Source evidence (as required by the README)

**Full `package.json`:**
```json
{
  "name": "vue3-admin-template",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "homepage": "https://HaitaoWang555.github.io/vue3-admin-template",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vue-cli-service serve",
    "build:prod": "vue-cli-service build",
    "preview": "node build/index.js --preview",
    "build:stage": "vue-cli-service build --mode staging",
    "svgo": "svgo -f src/icons/svg --config=src/icons/svgo.yml",
    "lint": "vue-cli-service lint"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "axios": "^0.26.1",
    "clipboard": "^2.0.10",
    "core-js": "^3.6.5",
    "element-plus": "^2.1.5",
    "normalize.css": "^8.0.1",
    "nprogress": "^0.2.0",
    "path-to-regexp": "^6.2.0",
    "store": "^2.0.12",
    "vue": "^3.0.0",
    "vue-router": "4",
    "vuex": "^4.0.2"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@vue/cli-plugin-babel": "~4.5.15",
    "@vue/cli-plugin-eslint": "~4.5.15",
    "@vue/cli-service": "~4.5.15",
    "@vue/compiler-sfc": "^3.0.0",
    "@vue/eslint-config-prettier": "^6.0.0",
    "babel-eslint": "^10.1.0",
    "connect": "3.7.0",
    "eslint": "^6.7.2",
    "eslint-plugin-prettier": "^3.3.1",
    "eslint-plugin-vue": "8.5.0",
    "lint-staged": "^9.5.0",
    "mockjs": "^1.1.0",
    "prettier": "^2.2.1",
    "runjs": "4.4.2",
    "sass": "^1.49.9",
    "sass-loader": "10.1.1",
    "script-ext-html-webpack-plugin": "2.1.5",
    "svg-sprite-loader": "^6.0.11",
    "svgo": "1.3.2",
    "tailwindcss": "npm:@tailwindcss/postcss7-compat@^2.2.17",
    "unplugin-auto-import": "^0.6.6",
    "unplugin-vue-components": "^0.18.4"
  },
  "gitHooks": {
    "pre-commit": "lint-staged"
  },
  "lint-staged": {
    "*.{js,jsx,vue}": [
      "vue-cli-service lint",
      "git add"
    ]
  }
}
```

**`.env.development`:**
```
# just a flag
ENV = 'development'

# base api
VUE_APP_BASE_API = '/dev-api'
```

**`.env.staging`:**
```
NODE_ENV = production

# just a flag
ENV = 'staging'

# base api
VUE_APP_BASE_API = '/stage-api'
```

**`.env.production`:**
```
# just a flag
ENV = 'production'

# base api
VUE_APP_BASE_API = '/prod-api'
```
